emails.subject: Tallahassee
emails.body: Jared Kaiser at UBS said we should speak with Roger McDonald at Tallahassee and that Pam McCullers (my contact) would be able to give us his number. I just left a voicemail for Pam McCullers asking for Roger's phone number and title.

emails.subject: RE: Tallahassee
emails.body: I called and left a message for Pete to start the dialog. Will keep you updated. To: Germany, Chris; Bridges, Michael

emails.subject: RE: Tallahassee
emails.body: I keep track of Tallahassee's swing volumes in this worksheet o:gas structuring/bankruptcy folder/city of tallahassee/tallahassee swing cash flow.xls, tab "actual gas flows". FYI if I recall Tallahassee is supposed to take a minimum of 35% of the swing gas. Through May 2, 2002, Tallahassee has called on 126,695 dth (52%) which is greater than the minimum requirement. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Tallahassee
emails.body: Chris, can you call Pam McCullers and get Pete's mailing address? To: Germany, Chris; Bridges, Michael

emails.subject: RE: Tallahassee
emails.body: 100 West Virgina St. Tallahassee, Florida 32301 To: Germany, Chris
